properties.name: reliable-task.enabled
properties.description: Whether ReliableTask auto-configuration is enabled.

properties.name: reliable-task.worker.enabled
properties.description: Whether the Worker polling scheduler is enabled.

properties.name: reliable-task.worker.poll-interval-ms
properties.description: Worker polling interval in milliseconds.

properties.name: reliable-task.worker.batch-size
properties.description: Maximum number of candidate tasks fetched by one Worker poll.

properties.name: reliable-task.worker.backpressure.enabled
properties.description: Whether Worker backpressure is enabled. Disabled by default to preserve V1.5 polling behavior.

properties.name: reliable-task.worker.backpressure.min-fetch-size
properties.description: Minimum fetch size required when Worker backpressure is enabled. Polling is skipped when available capacity is below this value.

properties.name: reliable-task.worker.backpressure.max-fetch-size
properties.description: Maximum fetch size allowed when Worker backpressure is enabled.

properties.name: reliable-task.worker.heartbeat.enabled
properties.description: Whether Worker heartbeat reporting is enabled. Disabled by default until V2 heartbeat components are configured.

properties.name: reliable-task.worker.heartbeat.interval-ms
properties.description: Worker heartbeat and running task lease renewal interval in milliseconds.

properties.name: reliable-task.worker.heartbeat.lock-renewal-ttl-seconds
properties.description: Lock TTL in seconds written by running task lease renewal.

properties.name: reliable-task.worker.heartbeat.stale-worker-threshold-seconds
properties.description: Threshold in seconds used to identify stale workers.

properties.name: reliable-task.recovery.enabled
properties.description: Whether timeout recovery scanning is enabled.

properties.name: reliable-task.recovery.interval-ms
properties.description: Timeout recovery scan interval in milliseconds.

properties.name: reliable-task.recovery.timeout-seconds
properties.description: Compatibility timeout setting in seconds. V1.5 recovery uses lock_expire_at; this value remains for existing configurations.

properties.name: reliable-task.recovery.max-reset-per-scan
properties.description: Maximum number of timeout tasks reset during one recovery scan.

properties.name: reliable-task.executor.default-core-size
properties.description: Default core thread count for task execution pools.

properties.name: reliable-task.executor.default-max-size
properties.description: Default maximum thread count for task execution pools.

properties.name: reliable-task.executor.default-queue-capacity
properties.description: Default queue capacity for task execution pools.

properties.name: reliable-task.executor.keep-alive-seconds
properties.description: Thread keep-alive time in seconds for task execution pools.

properties.name: reliable-task.metrics.enabled
properties.description: Whether Micrometer metrics are enabled.

properties.name: reliable-task.alert.enabled
properties.description: Whether ReliableTask alarm triggering is enabled.

properties.name: reliable-task.alert.pending-threshold
properties.description: Pending task backlog threshold. Values less than or equal to zero disable backlog alarms.

properties.name: reliable-task.alert.failure-rate-threshold
properties.description: Failure rate threshold in the recent metrics window. Range is 0 to 1.

properties.name: reliable-task.alert.window-seconds
properties.description: Metrics window size in seconds for failure-rate alarms.

properties.name: reliable-task.alert.scan-interval-ms
properties.description: Pending backlog alarm scan interval in milliseconds.

properties.name: reliable-task.idempotency.strategy
properties.description: Default task submission idempotency strategy.

properties.name: reliable-task.serializer.type
properties.description: Default task payload serializer type.

properties.name: reliable-task.store.table-prefix
properties.description: Reserved table prefix setting for storage implementations.

properties.name: reliable-task.admin.enabled
properties.description: Whether ReliableTask Admin REST APIs are enabled.

properties.name: reliable-task.admin.port
properties.description: Reserved Admin port setting for future separated management server support.

properties.name: reliable-task.admin.context-path
properties.description: Reserved Admin context path setting. V1.5 REST API path remains /api/reliable-task.

properties.name: reliable-task.admin.audit.enabled
properties.description: Whether Admin operation audit logging is enabled.

properties.name: reliable-task.admin.auth.enabled
properties.description: Whether Admin authorization checks are enabled.

properties.name: reliable-task.admin.batch.enabled
properties.description: Whether Admin batch operation APIs are enabled.
